response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, deep technical versatility, and demonstrable leadership in open-source and cross-functional projects, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years focused on production-grade AI systems, cloud-based GenAI deployment, or RAG/vector database implementations — key requirements for this staff-level GenAI role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and cloud-native tooling (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes)
Proven technical leadership through open-source contributions and mentoring (e.g., GISCollective, workshops)
Hands-on exposure to agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq, aligning with core job responsibilities
concerns: No explicit evidence of 8+ years building production AI systems; most AI-related work is recent and unverified
Lacks documented experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or LLM evaluation/optimization pipelines
Education shows only a BS; no advanced degree or published AI research to support staff-level GenAI credibility
